ogTitle: Little Hartley vs Little Jilliby: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Little Hartley and Little Jilliby.
heading: Little Hartley vs Little Jilliby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Little Hartley, New South Wales and Little Jilliby, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Little Jilliby has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Little Hartley (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Little Hartley or Little Jilliby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Little Hartley has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Little Jilliby scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Little Hartley scores 33/100 for bushfire risk. Little Jilliby scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Little Hartley or Little Jilliby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Little Jilliby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
